session.user: Run the following pytest command and report results: uv run pytest packages/erk-shared/tests/unit/agentclick/ -v Report all output including any failures.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command for the agentclick tests and report all results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run agentclick unit tests with verbose output
